findings.description: PascalCase class names `BasicDaoContextFactory` and `SequenceIdGenerator` appear in the s6 XML configuration example but are absent from the s6 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML for SqlTimeMetricsDaoContext configuration includes: `<component class="nablarch.common.dao.BasicDaoContextFactory">` and `<component class="nablarch.common.idgenerator.SequenceIdGenerator" />`
